input_roles.portrait_or_person_image: Provides identity, pose, composition and real body foundation.

change_scope: mild under-eye and uneven skin tone correction
critical_requirements: Preserve real skin texture, makeup texture and facial structure.
Body retouch must preserve realistic human proportion, clothing tension, limb structure and perspective.
negative_constraints: no face swap or identity change
no over-smoothing, liquify distortion or limb stretching
do not change clothing, background, pose relationship or scene narrative

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Perform natural restrained beauty/body retouch on portrait_or_person_image while preserving identity, facial proportions, hair, skin tone, costume, pose, composition and scene. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
